flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stony Brook University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.4k → $32.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stony Brook University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.6k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stony Brook University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Stony Brook University are 28% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($74.5k vs $58.3k).
